expectations.evidence: Line 22 subscribes to exactly [Deposited, Withdrawn, PositionIncreased, Allocated, Deallocated, Reallocated] — all 6 staking events
All display lines use $ prefix (e.g., line 58: '$ Deposited · ...'), and line 37 states '$ emoji prefix is used for all staking events'

Wei values are converted to human-readable format with 4 decimals and thousands separators (e.g., '50000000000000000000000' → '50,000.0000 AWP' on line 58). Step 5 explicitly describes BigInt parsing and 10^18 division.
